transcript: New findings from the Ming Dynasty tombs of Prince Jin Duan and his wife were unveiled by Shanxi Provincial Institute of Archaeology. Archaeologists found wooden sacrificial tables, desks and chairs in the tomb chamber, along with writing tools such as inkstones, Chinese calligraphy brush pens, and pen holders.
